details.question: Quanto de ferro tem o fígado?
details.sql_gerado:
SELECT f.food_name, fv.value AS ferro_mg, n.unit 
FROM fact_nutrient_values fv 
JOIN dim_food f ON fv.food_id = f.food_id 
JOIN dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id 
WHERE f.food_name ILIKE '%fígado%' 
  AND n.nutrient_name = 'ferro_mg' 
ORDER BY f.food_name;

details.question: Qual fruta tem maior teor de vitamina C?
details.sql_gerado:
SELECT f.food_name, fv.value AS vitamina_c_mg
FROM fact_nutrient_values fv
JOIN dim_food f ON fv.food_id = f.food_id
JOIN dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id
JOIN dim_food_group g ON f.food_group_id = g.food_group_id
WHERE g.food_group_name ILIKE '%frutas%'
  AND n.nutrient_name = 'vitamina_c_mg'
  AND fv.value IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY fv.value DESC
LIMIT 10;

details.question: Qual grupo alimentar tem maior quantidade de cálcio?
details.sql_gerado:
SELECT 
    g.food_group_name, 
    SUM(fv.value) AS total_calcio_mg
FROM 
    fact_nutrient_values fv
JOIN 
    dim_food f ON fv.food_id = f.food_id
JOIN 
    dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id
JOIN 
    dim_food_group g ON f.food_group_id = g.food_group_id
WHERE 
    n.nutrient_name = 'calcio_mg'
    AND fv.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    g.food_group_name
ORDER BY 
    total_calcio_mg DESC
LIMIT 10;

details.question: Qual semente tem maior cálcio em comparação com o leite e derivados?
details.sql_gerado:
SELECT 
    f.food_name, 
    fv.value AS calcio_mg
FROM 
    fact_nutrient_values fv
JOIN 
    dim_food f ON fv.food_id = f.food_id
JOIN 
    dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id
WHERE 
    n.nutrient_name = 'calcio_mg'
    AND (f.food_name ILIKE '%semente%' OR f.food_name ILIKE '%noz%')
    AND fv.value IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    fv.value DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    f.food_name, 
    fv.value AS calcio_mg
FROM 
    fact_nutrient_values fv
JOIN 
    dim_food f ON fv.food_id = f.food_id
JOIN 
    dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id
JOIN 
    dim_food_group g ON f.food_group_id = g.food_group_id
WHERE 
    n.nutrient_name = 'calcio_mg'
    AND g.food_group_name ILIKE '%leite%'
    AND fv.value IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    fv.value DESC
LIMIT 10;

details.question: Qual alimento mais calórico de cada grupo?
details.sql_gerado:
WITH ranked_foods AS (
  SELECT 
    g.food_group_name,
    f.food_name,
    fv.value AS energia_kcal,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY g.food_group_name ORDER BY fv.value DESC) AS row_num
  FROM fact_nutrient_values fv
  JOIN dim_food f ON fv.food_id = f.food_id
  JOIN dim_food_group g ON f.food_group_id = g.food_group_id
  JOIN dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id
  WHERE n.nutrient_name = 'energia_kcal'
    AND fv.value IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT food_group_name, food_name, energia_kcal
FROM ranked_foods
WHERE row_num = 1
ORDER BY energia_kcal DESC;

details.question: Qual alimento mais pobre em vitamina B1?
details.sql_gerado:
SELECT f.food_name, fv.value AS tiamina_mg, n.unit
FROM fact_nutrient_values fv
JOIN dim_food f ON fv.food_id = f.food_id
JOIN dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id
WHERE n.nutrient_name = 'tiamina_mg'
  AND fv.value IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY fv.value ASC
LIMIT 10;

details.question: Qual alimento tem melhor fonte de ômega-3?
details.sql_gerado:
SELECT f.food_name, fv.value AS ag_18_3_n3_g, n.unit
FROM fact_nutrient_values fv
JOIN dim_food f ON fv.food_id = f.food_id
JOIN dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id
WHERE n.nutrient_name IN ('ag_18_3_n3_g', 'ag_20_5_g', 'ag_22_6_g')
  AND fv.value IS NOT NULL
  AND fv.value > 0
ORDER BY fv.value DESC
LIMIT 10;

details.question: Qual alimento tem maior teor de zinco?
details.sql_gerado:
SELECT f.food_name, fv.value AS zinco_mg, n.unit
FROM fact_nutrient_values fv
JOIN dim_food f ON fv.food_id = f.food_id
JOIN dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id
WHERE n.nutrient_name = 'zinco_mg'
  AND fv.value IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY fv.value DESC
LIMIT 10;

details.question: Qual alimento é mais pobre em vitamina B3?
details.sql_gerado:
SELECT f.food_name, fv.value AS niacina_mg, n.unit
FROM fact_nutrient_values fv
JOIN dim_food f ON fv.food_id = f.food_id
JOIN dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id
WHERE n.nutrient_name = 'niacina_mg'
  AND fv.value IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY fv.value ASC
LIMIT 10;

details.question: Quantos alimentos não possuem vitamina D?
details.sql_gerado:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.food_id) 
FROM dim_food f 
WHERE f.food_id NOT IN (
  SELECT fv.food_id 
  FROM fact_nutrient_values fv 
  JOIN dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id 
  WHERE n.nutrient_name = 'vitamina_d_mcg' 
    AND fv.value IS NOT NULL 
    AND fv.value > 0
)
details.resposta_preview: De acordo com a Tabela Brasileira de Composição de Alimentos (TACO), existem 597 alimentos que não possuem vitamina D registrada em sua composição nutricional por 100g do alimento. Isso significa que, para esses alimentos, não há valor disponível de vitamina D (em microgramas, mcg) por 100g do alime

details.question: Quais alimentos possuem maior quantidade de vitamina D?
details.sql_gerado:
SELECT f.food_name, fv.value, n.unit
FROM fact_nutrient_values fv
JOIN dim_food f ON fv.food_id = f.food_id
JOIN dim_nutrient n ON fv.nutrient_id = n.nutrient_id
WHERE n.nutrient_name = 'vitamina_d_mcg'
  AND fv.value IS NOT NULL
  AND fv.value > 0
ORDER BY fv.value DESC
LIMIT 10;
details.resposta_preview:
⚠️ Dados contidos na tabela TACO insuficientes ou o alimento não apresenta quantidade significativa de vitamina D registrada na base.

A TACO 4ª edição não possui dados de vitamina D para a maioria dos alimentos, o que limita a capacidade de fornecer uma lista de alimentos com maior quantidade de vi
